title: Interplanetary Acquisitions
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Interplanetary Acquisitions''' was a small business that dealt with the refurbishing and sale of used starships. During the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Interplanetary Acquisitions was used as a front for the ship smuggler, [[Pal-Nada]]. The company served as a means for Pal-Nada to move and sell stolen starships on the black market.

==Appearances==
